title: oncidium anthocrene
intro: Oncidium anthocrene, also known as the yellow and white Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Oncidium anthocrene include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
